summary: IDC Version 15 cancer imaging collection catalog available via Google BigQuery. Columns include ID, title, access level, DOI, cancer type, body location, subject count, collections, analysis artifacts on TCIA, and updated date.

IDC Version 15 clinical cancer imaging data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include DICOM patient ID, source batch, I-SPY 2 research ID, TCIA patient ID, imaging timepoints T0-T3, and BMMR2 train/test indicators.

IMDB film and TV cast/crew data with review labels available via Google BigQuery. Columns include name constant, primary name, birth year, death year, primary profession, known titles, review, split, label, and movie ID.

Immune Epitope Database (IEDB) antigen and epitope data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include antigen name/ID, organism name/ID, number of epitopes/assays/references, assay IRI, reference IRI, and type.

Iowa liquor retail sales data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include invoice and item number, date, store number, store name, address, city, ZIP code, store location, item name, and purchase count.
Iowa liquor sales forecasting dataset available via Google BigQuery. Columns include date, store name, city, ZIP code, county, and sale dollars.

IRS Form 990 nonprofit organization tax filing data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include EIN, tax period, subsection code, unrelated business income indicator, initiation fees, gross receipts, member income, other income, total contributions/gifts, and total program revenue.

Google-labeled patent publication data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include GCS path, issuer, language, publication date, international and US class codes, application number, filing date, priority date, and representative line.

Libraries.io software package dependency data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include ID, platform, project name/ID, version number/ID, dependency name, dependency platform, dependency kind, and optional dependency flag.

ListenBrainz music listening history dataset available via Google BigQuery. Columns include listened-at timestamp, user name, artist MSID/name/MBIDs, release MSID/name/MBID, recording MSID, and track name.

London bicycle hire (Boris Bikes) trip records available via Google BigQuery. Columns include rental ID, duration, duration in milliseconds, bike ID, bike model, end date, end station ID/name, start date, and start station ID.
London Metropolitan Police crime statistics by borough and category available via Google BigQuery. Columns include LSOA code, borough, major category, minor category, value (count), year, and month.

London Fire Brigade incident response records available via Google BigQuery. Columns include incident number, date/time of call, calendar year, hour of call, timestamp, incident group, stop code description, special service type, and property category.
MAREC European patent XML corpus available via Google BigQuery. Columns include publication number, original publication number, XML content, and truncated indicator.

CMS Medicare inpatient provider and DRG payment data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include DRG definition, provider ID/name/address/city/state/ZIP, hospital referral region, total discharges, and average covered charges.

Machine learning census income classification dataset available via Google BigQuery. Columns include age, workclass, functional weight, education, education number, marital status, occupation, relationship, race, and sex.
Palmer Station penguin measurement dataset for machine learning available via Google BigQuery. Columns include species, island, culmen length, culmen depth, flipper length, body mass, and sex.
MODIS Terra net primary production (NPP) geospatial data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include geography point, geography polygon, year, NPP value, and NPP quality control flag.
Moon phase data with emoji representation available via Google BigQuery. Columns include phase name, phase emoji, and peak datetime.
Multilingual spoken words corpus metadata available via Google BigQuery. Columns include language abbreviation, language name, number of words, word, word count, and filename.

NASA VIIRS active wildfire and thermal anomaly detection data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include latitude, longitude, brightness temperature (TI4), scan, track, acquisition date/time, satellite, confidence, and version.

NOAA National Water Model streamflow forecast data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include time, reference time, feature ID, streamflow, nudge value, velocity, surface lateral runoff, bucket flow, bottom vertical runoff, and ensemble.
NCAA basketball team information including mascot taxonomy available via Google BigQuery. Columns include team ID, market, name, mascot name/common name, and taxonomic classification fields.
NCES IPEDS postsecondary completions data by CIP code available via Google BigQuery. Columns include unit ID, CIP code, major number, award level, and degree counts by total, male, and female.

New York City 311 service request data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include unique key, created/closed dates, agency name, complaint type, descriptor, location type, incident ZIP code, and incident address.

New York City 311 service request data (alternate table) available via Google BigQuery. Columns include unique key, created/closed dates, agency name, complaint type, descriptor, location type, incident ZIP code, and incident address.

New York City Citi Bike station data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include station ID, name, short name, latitude, longitude, region ID, rental methods, capacity, key dispenser availability, and number of bikes available.

New York City motor vehicle collision records available via Google BigQuery. Columns include borough, contributing factors for up to five vehicles, cross street name, timestamp, latitude, and longitude.

New York City subway network geographic data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include borough code/name/area/length/geometry, route ID, route short/long names, route description, and route type.
New York City taxi trip records available via Google BigQuery. Columns include zone ID/name/borough/geometry, location ID, pickup datetime, dispatching base number, and service zone.
New York City street tree census data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include record ID, address, house number, street, original ZIP, community board, site, species, diameter, and status.

NHTSA Fatality Analysis Reporting System (FARS) traffic fatality data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include state number/name, consecutive case number, vehicle form counts, motor vehicles in transport, parked vehicles, and person counts by transport status.

NIH GUDID (Global Unique Device Identification Database) medical device data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include primary device identifier, phone, email, public device record key, version status, record status, version number, and version date.

NIH Sequence Read Archive genomic variant data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include run ID, chromosome, position, reference allele, alternate allele, depth, allele depth, effect, functional class, and codon.
NLM RxNorm drug terminology and relationship data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include source RxCUI, source TTY, source name, target RxCUI, target TTY, and target name.
NOAA Global Forecast System (GFS) weather prediction data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include creation time, geography point, geography polygon, and forecast data.
NOAA Global Forecast System 2-week extended forecast data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include ID, provider ID, type, name, extended name, observation subject, variable measured, and value.

NOAA GOES-16 geostationary satellite imagery metadata available via Google BigQuery. Columns include dataset name, platform ID, orbital slot, timeline ID, scene ID, band ID, time coverage start/end, date created, and western longitude boundary.

NOAA GOES-17 geostationary satellite imagery metadata available via Google BigQuery. Columns include dataset name, platform ID, orbital slot, timeline ID, scene ID, band ID, time coverage start/end, date created, and western longitude boundary.

NOAA Global Surface Summary of Day (GSOD) weather station data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include station number, WBAN, year, month, day, temperature, temperature count, dewpoint, dewpoint count, and sea level pressure.
NOAA historic severe storm event records available via Google BigQuery. Columns include timestamp, time, size, location, county, state, latitude, longitude, comments, and report point.

NOAA International Best Track Archive for Climate Stewardship (IBTrACS) hurricane data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include storm ID, season, number, basin, subbasin, name, ISO time, nature, latitude, and longitude.

NOAA International Comprehensive Ocean-Atmosphere Data Set (ICOADS) marine surface observations available via Google BigQuery. Columns include year, month, day, hour, latitude, longitude, IMMA version, attachment count, time indicator, and lat/lon indicator.
NOAA lightning strike density data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include date, number of strikes, center point geometry, source URL, and ETL timestamp.

NOAA passive acoustic monitoring index data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include file name, deployment name, start date/time, source organization, funding organization, project name, sensor depth, sample rate, and duration.

NOAA passive bioacoustic monitoring data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include cloud path, file name, start date/time, data collection name, source organization, funding organization, project name, sensor depth, and sample rate.

NOAA Pacific Islands Fisheries Science Center (PIFSC) acoustic monitoring metadata available via Google BigQuery. Columns include array start/end times (local and UTC), array identifiers, and hydrophone distance and amplitude data.
NOAA preliminary severe storm event reports available via Google BigQuery. Columns include timestamp, time, size, location, county, state, latitude, longitude, comments, and report point.
NOAA significant earthquake catalog available via Google BigQuery. Columns include ID, tsunami flag, year, month, day, hour, minute, second, focal depth, and primary earthquake magnitude.
NOAA tsunami event catalog available via Google BigQuery. Columns include ID, tsunami event ID, year, month, day, timestamp, doubtful indicator, country, state, and location name.

NPPES (National Plan and Provider Enumeration System) taxonomy classification codes available via Google BigQuery. Columns include code, grouping, classification, specialization, definition, and notes.

NREL National Solar Radiation Database (NSRDB) solar resource data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include UTC time, diffuse horizontal irradiance, direct normal irradiance, wind speed, air temperature, filename, latitude, longitude, elevation, and timezone.
Google Open Buildings dataset of global building footprints available via Google BigQuery. Columns include latitude, longitude, area in square meters, confidence score, geometry, and full plus code.

Google Open Images object detection and image label annotations available via Google BigQuery. Columns include image ID, source, label name, confidence, bounding box coordinates, occluded indicator, and truncated indicator.

Open Targets Platform disease-target genetic association scores available via Google BigQuery. Columns include disease ID, target ID, aggregation type, aggregation value, association score, evidence count, timeseries, and current novelty.
OpenAQ global air quality monitoring measurements available via Google BigQuery. Columns include location, city, country, pollutant, value, timestamp, unit, source name, latitude, and longitude.
Overture Maps Foundation address data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include ID, street, number, unit, postcode, postal city, address levels, country, sources, and version.

Google Patents worldwide patent publication data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include publication number, application number, country code, kind code, application kind, formatted application number, PCT number, family ID, and SPIF publication/application numbers.

Cooperative Patent Classification (CPC) code hierarchy and definitions available via Google BigQuery. Columns include breakdown code, child groups, children, date revised, definition, glossary, informative references, IPC concordant, and level.

Patent standard-essential patent (SEP) disclosure data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include family ID, record ID, disclosure event, SSO, patent owner (harmonized and unharmonized), date, standard, committee project, and TC name.
PatentsView USPTO patent application data available via Google BigQuery. Columns include ID, patent ID, series code, application number, country, and date.
Google BigQuery persistent user-defined functions (UDFs) available via Google BigQuery. No column details provided.

PubMed Central open-access article text with ML embeddings available via Google BigQuery. Columns include ML embedding result/statistics, article text, article file, article citation, last updated, PMID, license, retracted flag, and version.
